HGSS.581.0000:
Apparently, there is an odd tree
on Route 36.\f
They say it dances when you
water it...\f
Oh, of course not!\f
This is a Flower Shop, so we do have
watering cans and things like that...\f
But I cannot let you have one!
It’s too dangerous!\r
Hmmm...\f
Well, maybe if you manage to defeat
the Goldenrod Gym Leader, it might\r
be OK...
HGSS.581.0001:
Apparently, there is an odd tree
on Route 36.\f
They say it dances when you water it...\f
Oh, that’s a Plain Badge from
Goldenrod Gym!\f
Did you defeat Whitney?!
Well, then there’s nothing to worry\r
about, is there?\f
I’ll let you use this SquirtBottle for
a while then... Oh, never mind.\r
Keep it!\f
HGSS.581.0002:
The odd tree is on Route 36.
Please be careful!
HGSS.581.0003:
Lalala lalalala.
Have plenty of water, my lovely!\f
HGSS.581.0004:
Are you using the Berry Pots?\f
You can pick any of the Berries you
have planted.\f
Don’t forget to water them!
HGSS.581.0005:
How...
...\r
...\r
...\r
cute!\f
Where did you get that...
oh-so-cute Pokémon?\f
HGSS.581.0006:
SHAYMIN, is it?
It’s so cute!\f
I know!\f
Let me give it a flower!
I have just the one for it!\f
HGSS.581.0007:
The Gracidea will look perfect on
SHAYMIN!\r
Put it on SHAYMIN in the daylight.
HGSS.581.0008:
Mulch!
Anyone want Mulch?\f
Berries love Mulch.
It makes Berries grow faster!\f
HGSS.581.0009:
That [0108,0000,0000] is a mix of
high-quality soil and Pokémon’s...\r
er...you know...\f
It’s full of nutrients!
Berries will surely benefit from it.
HGSS.581.0013:
Well... Excuse me, but
you’re short of money.
